response:
Certainly! Here's a revised version of your email in English, with PII removed and replaced with generic placeholders:

---

Dear [Recipient's Name],

Thank you for your response. We have sent you an invitation to attend a training session on [Training Title], which will take place on [Date] at 14:00–15:00. The training will be conducted in English and is scheduled to be held at [Location].

We kindly ask you to attend at your convenience and look forward to your participation.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Organization]  

---

Let me know if you'd like to personalize it further!
